summary: Footer overlaps interactive elements blocking user actions
environment: Mobile devices and small viewport heights
description: On multiple steps, the footer overlaps key interactive elements such as buttons, input fields, and checkboxes, making them partially or fully inaccessible. Scrolling is not possible, which blocks the user from completing the flow.
steps_to_reproduce: Proceed to any step with input fields or buttons
Use a device with small viewport height (e.g. iPhone SE)
Observe the bottom part of the screen
actual_result: Footer overlays interactive elements. User cannot click or interact with them. Scrolling is not available.
expected_result: Footer should not overlap interactive elements. All elements must remain accessible and visible.
notes: Reproducible across multiple steps and devices depending on screen resolution.

summary: Cookie widget layout does not match design on mobile
description: Cookie widget is displayed incorrectly: text and button are visually centered instead of being aligned to opposite sides. The widget appears larger and less compact than expected.
steps_to_reproduce: Open landing page on mobile device
actual_result: Text and button are centered. Layout does not match design.
expected_result: Text should be aligned to the left and button to the right as per design.

summary: Cookie value is stored as raw JSON causing potential payment page failure
description: The wizardAnswers cookie stores values as raw JSON instead of encoded format. This may break payment page functionality when the cookie is passed further.
actual_result: Cookie value is stored as raw JSON string.
expected_result: Cookie value should be properly encoded (e.g. URL-encoded) before being stored.
notes: Correct implementation observed on updated yellow landings.

summary: Duplicate user_screen_resolution event logged in console
description: When opening or refreshing the page, the user_screen_resolution event is logged twice in the console, while only one request is sent in the network tab.
actual_result: Event appears twice in console logs.
expected_result: Event should be logged only once.
notes: Does not affect network requests but may indicate duplicated logic.

summary: Grammar mistake in cookie widget text
description: Cookie widget text contains a grammatical error: 'If you continue to use this site we will assume that you are happy with it.' is missing punctuation or spacing.
actual_result: Text contains grammatical or formatting issue.
expected_result: Text should be grammatically correct and properly formatted.
notes: Observed on multiple landings (e.g. am33, am38).
